title: asclepias cutleri
intro: Asclepias cutleri, also known as the Cutler's milkweed or Cutler's butterfly milkweed, is a perennial plant species in the genus Asclepias. It belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. Asclepias cutleri contains medicinal properties, particularly in its roots and stems, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
